mismatches.pred_reason: Contains patient sleep history/intake items and symptom checklist (snoring/apnea, EDS, insomnia, hallucinations, etc.) plus scale scores (ESS, BDI) and demographics; no PSG metrics/tables or clinician PSG interpretation, and not a morning-after questionnaire.
Contains polysomnography data, detailed PSG metrics (sleep architecture, respiratory events, PLMS) and an explicit RESPIRATORY DISTURBANCE INDEX section.
